title: Not equal evaluation does not work
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (id INTEGER, value TEXT, status BOOLEAN);
CREATE TABLE t4 (id INTEGER, score REAL, description TEXT);
SELECT t3.id, t3.value, t4.score FROM t3 JOIN t4 ON t3.status <> (t4.score IS NOT NULL) WHERE t3.id > 1;
key_bug_features: Not equal evaluation in SQL query fails
